summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 資料中心基礎設施需求強勁，Eaton 的長期轉型價值持續獲得市場與分析師肯定。

bullish.title: Watch These 5 Non-Tech Stocks Thriving in 2026 on AI Data Center Boom
bullish.reason: Eaton 被列為 AI 資料中心電力基礎設施需求激增的主要受惠者，顯示其核心業務與當前科技成長趨勢高度契合。

bullish.title: Morgan Stanley Says Eaton’s (ETN) Transformation Remains Underappreciated
bullish.reason: 摩根士丹利指出 Eaton 的企業轉型價值尚未被市場充分定價，暗示未來仍有股價重估的空間。

bullish.title: How The Eaton (ETN) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Deals Guidance And Mixed Analyst Views
bullish.reason: 目標價小幅上調至 451.73 美元，反映出公司在業務指引與交易執行上的正面進展。

bullish.title: Eaton or ABB: Which Electrification Giant Offers More Upside?
bullish.reason: 透過與 ABB 的比較分析，顯示 Eaton 在電氣化領域的獲利能力與成長潛力仍具備市場競爭力。

bearish.title: Is Eaton Corporation Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
bearish.reason: 報導指出 Eaton 股價在過去一年略微落後於標普 500 指數，反映出短期股價動能相對大盤較為疲軟。

neutral.title: Here's How Much You Would Have Made Owning Eaton Corp Stock In The Last 10 Years
neutral.reason: 僅為歷史績效回顧，對未來股價走勢無直接影響。

neutral.title: Eaton Corporation, PLC (ETN) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
neutral.reason: 僅為熱門搜尋與基本事實整理，未提供新的投資建議或利多利空催化劑。
